title: Musket Mod
body:
### Mechanics

RMB loads and fires guns. Full sized ones can't be used from offhand.

All guns are unusable inside water and bullets lose power when flying through it.

Bullets can ignite TNT and destroy some blocks (only non-stained glass panes by default).

Headshots increase bullet damage by 30% (applies to most bipedal mobs).

### Musket

![Musket recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12772eb7adba74b463c782fef73509530eee0022.png)

Damage: 16\
Durability: 250\
Enchantments: Knockback

### Musket Upgrade smithing template

![Musket Upgrade smithing template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fa227d33b3253542ce6c051bdafbbc40d3d0c92.png)

Required to craft upgraded muskets. Has a high chance to spawn in strongholds and woodland mansions and with a lower chance in other overworld structures.

### Musket with Bayonet

![Musket with Bayonet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a7b28da97bca07738bbeb6d16cc8e4c7828d25a.png)

Melee damage: 5\
Enchantments: Sharpness, Smite, Bane of Arthropods

### Scoped Musket

![Scoped Musket recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d091cbe8e0ac5f5d91d759b5285d648c815af11.png)

Zoom factor: 3x\
Durability: 150\
Enchantments: Knockback

Greatly improved accuracy and reduced bullet drop. Use RMB to aim and LMB to fire.

### Blunderbuss

![Blunderbuss recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aab716fb5321ca1740ebdd03f6dadb0aa87c58e.png)

Damage: 21\
Durability: 200\
Enchantments: Flame

Fires 9 pellets with much higher spread than musket.

### Pistol

![Pistol recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a83b78efbc5adfa24ef635f7d6c07b537c40321.png)

Damage: 12\
Durability: 200\
Enchantments: Quick Charge

Can be fired from any and both hands. You can reload both by holding down RMB.

### Paper cartridge (ammunition)

![Paper cartridge recipe (shapeless)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8bfadd8a3c838eae9e466690a28365733c87884.png)

Dispensers can fire them dealing 10 damage.

### Monsters

Pillagers and skeletons (all kinds) can use guns. They also may spawn with one (20% for pillagers with a pistol, 5% for skeletons with a musket).

Monsters deal 50% damage with guns by default.

### Configuration:

Settings can be accessed from Forge/NeoForge mods menu or via Mod Menu on Fabric.

Bullet spread follows normal distribution like in real life but it is awkward to configure. Here is a table that should help with that: [bulletStdDev](https://github.com/ewewukek/mc-musketmod/blob/main/STDDEV.md)

More information on mod source page.

### Resourcepacks

![flintl0cks resource pack preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95447c470cc6c8c1e97c269a5edc17771dd15a0d.png)

[flintl0cks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/flintl0cks) - Custom 3D models by Scarecrow0001

![3D Musket](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1083/133/256/256/638623753280521536.png)

[3D Musket](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ewewukeks-3d-musket) - Custom 3D models by Maxiikk

![Sound pack icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b56dae71c6ddc027e0f2a70c5542f47d9acf280a.png)

[Alternative shot sounds](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-addons/alternative-sounds-musket-mod) - Alternative sound effects by Michail01011101

![Alternative Musket Sounds](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1088/277/256/256/638631107951839226.png)

[Alternative Musket Sounds](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-addons/alternative-musket-sounds-for-ewewukeks-musket-mod) - Alternative sound effects by ChaosCommander

![Alternative textures preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/702157bbe6ede31568119a07b353772b60e18a75.png)

[Musket textures by Quartofel](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/musket-textures-by-quartofel) - Alternative textures by Quartofel

### Permissions

You may include this mod in any modpack, private or public, along with any modifications.

My art is free to use for anyone.

Sounds that I based mine on are listed here: [credits.txt](https://github.com/ewewukek/mc-musketmod/blob/main/src/main/resources/assets/musketmod/sounds/credits.txt)
